# I01: First Iteration

## Grounds

The grounds for the first iteration. We need to build a space model.

## Specification

The specification for the first iteration.

- Must have spaces table
- Must have iterations table
- Must have artifacts table

## Acceptance Criteria

- AC-1: Migration creates all three tables
- AC-2: SpaceImporter imports fixture correctly

## Builder Prompt

Build the space model and import backend as specified.

## Builder Report

Implementation complete. All tables created, importer working.

## Verdict

continue
